Title: Tank Exemplar
SubTitle: Tank Exemplar Quests
Warrior:
## 🛡️ Warrior Exemplar Quest

**Quest Name:** Warrior Exemplar Quest  
**Level:** 55-60  
**Class:** Warrior  
**NPC:** —  
**Location:** Oggok

---

### 1️⃣ Quest Start
Log the quest with the **Priest of Rallos Zek**, located outside the north gate of Oggok. He will send you to see **Ragh Skulcrak** in **Oggok Gate (S)**.

---

### 2️⃣ Bandit Blades
Ragh is located in the same general area as Ozmo da Basher, but closer to the gate. He sends you to bandits north of the gate (**Oggok Gate (C)**), along the mountain. Kill and loot the **Bandit Thugs** until you get **6 Bandit Blades**, then return to Ragh.

---

### 3️⃣ Diren's Hold
Ragh will now send you back to the **Priest of Rallos Zek**, who sends you to see **Dhia Stoneshield** in **Diren's Hold (C)**. She is not in the village, but above it in the fort on top of the mountain.

She sends you to find a "beast" in **Mount Hatespike** that you **cannot kill** — you must let it attack you until it gives up and goes away.

---

### 4️⃣ Fell Beast Encounter
Head to **Mt. Hatespike (N)** to find the **Fell Beast** (southeast of the Frozen Souls) in a small canyon-triggered spawn.

You must **tank him for 10 minutes**. After 10 minutes he despawns and your quest log updates. Do **not** kill the mob.

Necroevil (FH) explains the spawn point: From Frozen Souls head southeast, follow the canyon until it starts turning southbound — at that curve he will jump you.

Azzare notes there is a slight glitch: you must be exactly on the spawn spot to receive the popup. Otherwise you may tank indefinitely without completion. If this happens, move around the area to find the correct spot.

---

### 5️⃣ Final Choice
Return to **Dhia Stoneshield**, then back to the **Priest of Rallos Zek**, where you must choose between:

- learning more about hurting your enemy — **Dropkick**, or  
- learning more about altering your stats from dex to wis — **Serenity**.

This is similar to the Paladin Exemplar Quest. You can redo the quest later to choose the other ability, but you cannot hold both abilities in your spellbook at the same time.

---

## ⚔️ Dropkick (Offensive Path)

Seek **Ragh Skulcrak** in **Oggok Gate (S)**. He sends you to farm the **Bandit Thugs** again (north of the gate, Oggok Gate (C)). Items stack to 50. When full, return to Ragh and throw them into **Ragh's Firepit**.

You gain faction for each item thrown into the fire. You need **2,000 faction** to proceed.

- Blades give 10 faction  
- Charms give 50 faction

**NOTE:** Continue speaking with the Firepit and choose "No" before finishing the quest with the Priest of Rallos Zek. Failing to do so may cause the quest to loop between NPCs and require CSR assistance to correct.

Speak with the **Priest of Rallos Zek** and request your offensive reward. He opens a **1cm ability called Dropkick**.

If you later want the dex→wis buff instead, redo steps 1–5 and choose Serenity.

---

## 🛡️ Serenity (Defensive Path)

Return to **Dhia Stoneshield** in **Diren's Hold (C)**. Farm **Frozen Souls** in **Mt. Hatespike (N)** for **Soul Shards** (stack to 50). When full, return to Dhia and place them into **Dhia's Blessed Chest** beside her.

Each item grants faction (10 or 50). You need **2,000 faction** to proceed.

Speak with the **Priest of Rallos Zek** to receive your reward. He opens a **1cm ability called Serenity**.

If you later want Dropkick instead, redo steps 1–5 and choose Dropkick.

---

## 🎁 Rewards

**Offensive Path (Ragh):** Opens a 1cm ability called **Ankle Biter** — this attack cripples your opponent for a short time and causes damage; adds ability **Dropkick**.  
Lvl 54 Equip req: Any Power:250 Cast:1 Recast:6 Range:5  
99 damage + 150% Str mod

**Dhia's Path:** Opens a 1cm ability called **Tranquility**, granting the level 60 ability **Serenity**. This ability changes Dex buffs to Wis buffs. **+65 Wis**, duration 10 minutes.
Paladin:
## 🛡️ Paladin Exemplar Quest

**Quest Name:** Paladin Exemplar  
**Level:** —  
**Class:** Paladin  
**NPC:** Priest of Marr  
**Location:** Qeynos, Paladin Building

---

The **Priest of Marr** is found in the Paladin building in Qeynos (sux to be a were at this time 😅).

He first sends you to **Diren's Hold** (just within the fort along the river) to speak to **Exemplar Zarakiel** (stands with 2 disciples next to the tower).

### ⚔️ Bandit Justice
Zarakiel gives you a task to bring Justice to a group of 6 bandits (unconnable at first) found east of Darvor Manor in **Bandit Hills (W)**.

Note: These are NOT the new high-level bandit camp. The group of 6 bandits are in a valley one hill over from the Old Man and Goran's Beasts (STR quest), surrounding two rocks. Tossinpots: 10 second run directly south of Old Man.

The bandits will not con until you receive a popup, triggering 3 at a time. They con dark blue to white to a 60. Only one person must loot all 6 sashes to turn in to Zarakiel.

If multiple paladins are waiting, each must complete the event separately (approx. 15 min respawn).

Turn in sashes to Zarakiel, then return to the Priest of Marr. Dialogue choice does not matter.

---

### 🌿 Escort Mission
The Priest sends you to **Druid's Watch** (SE from Qeynos) to find **Exemplar Alesthenies**, located NW of Melton Village (1 minute outside), near the new Qeynos prison, standing with 2 disciples.

She sends you to Mariel Village to protect a group of people and escort them to the **Wyndhaven coach**.

They spawn in **Wyndhaven (N)** near the mountainside, surrounding a rock — only after answering a popup question correctly (about flowers that bloom).

Several "hobbit-like" named NPCs appear. Protect them as they walk to Wyndhaven. Zealots ambush along the path when the group begins to scatter.

- First ambush: around a large rock  
- Second ambush: at bottom of deep ravine near large rock

Tip: Stay back as they scatter so zealots spawn first — pick them off one by one instead of getting mobbed.

Zealots and bandits hit hard — bring a healer.

If you die, you must restart the entire quest 😢.

Only one person must loot all 6 sashes from final ambush.

Stay with the group until they reach the coach, then speak with the leader.

Return to Alesthenies, then back to the Priest of Marr.

⚠️ Use XP pot or Luck for this part. Without it: ~10.5 mil XP. With Luck: ~21 mil XP.

---

## ⚖️ Final Choice — Marr Side
The Priest asks which Marr side you will take. Initial answer does not matter until final decision confirmation.

---

# 🏆 Rewards

## ⚔️ JUSTICE PATH
Farm bandit camp east of Darvor Manor for NTL sashes.

For every 4 sashes turned in, gain +40 faction with Champions of Mithaniel Marr.

Reach +2000 faction to qualify.

Speak to disciple of Marr dedicated to Zarakiel (right side of Paladin temple doorway) for approval note, then return to Priest.

Reward (1 cm): Upgrade to all 4 heals. Changes to self-heal only and boosts healing amount.

Before quest: 610 heal  
After quest: 840–859 heal (base charisma)

---

## 🕊️ MERCY PATH
From Roygar (Marr's Fist): Priest sends you to **Priestess Agilyna** in **Muelin's Reach** (small hill center of zone, run NW from Lost Soul camp (C)).

### ✨ Alesthenies' Mercy (By Silverfangg)
AC Buff  
Level: 60  
Scope: Target  
Cast: 1  
Recast: 180  
Power: 294  
Range: 15  
Equip: Reg

Increases Armour Class by 300–1000 depending on target's current AC. Lower AC targets receive higher benefit.
Shadowknight:
## ☠️ SK Exemplar Quest

**Quest Name:** SK Exemplar Quest  
**Level:** —  
**Class:** Shadowknight  
**NPC:** Priest of Bertoxxulous  
**Location:** Freeport

---

### 1️⃣ Quest Start
Log the quest with the **Priest of Bertoxxulous**, located in an alcove at the bottom of the Rogue/SK Guild in Freeport (next to Necorik the Ghost).

---

### 2️⃣ Urglauh the Foul
You are sent to see **Urglauh the Foul** in **Trail's End (N)**. He is located in a tunnel under the guard tower (where Inspector Flint stands for the HP Storyteller Quest) near the highway bandits. Speak with Urglauh and tell him you were sent to be his disciple.

---

### 3️⃣ Corrupt the Villagers
Urglauh sends you to corrupt villagers in **Sunnyvale (Jared's Blight (N))**.

Outside the village are roaming **Villagers** (con lb@60 but high HP). Kill villagers until a **Corrupted Soul** spawns. TALK to the soul — it despawns and gives you a **Soul Energy**.

Collect **5 Soul Energies**, then return to Urglauh.

---

### 4️⃣ Miasma Malignus
Return to the Priest of Bertoxxulous, who sends you to **Miasma Malignus** in **Green Rift (W)** (tent across from Spiritmaster Draxul).

Speaking with her gives **-2000 faction with Enraged of Karana**.

She asks you to gain the trust of pilgrims and turn them from their god. Find **Pilgrim Disciples** and **Pilgrim Apostles** in **Green Rift (S)** at two camps along the edge of the bowl-shaped valley with the lake.

Speak with them and choose dialogue carefully. If you fail, they respawn as **Enraged Pilgrims** and attack you (others will not aggro).

You must return with **5 walking sticks**, freely given (not broken).

---

### 5️⃣ Return to Priest
Return to Miasma with the walking sticks, then return to the Priest of Bertoxxulous.

You must now choose between:
- learning more about **Soultap** (power steal, similar to life tap), or
- causing pain and suffering to those around you (**AoE strike**).

Like the Paladin Exemplar quest, you may redo the quest later but cannot hold both abilities at the same time.

---

## 🩸 SOULTAP PATH (Soul Drain)
You receive **10.5 million XP** and are sent back to **Miasma Malignus**.

She asks you to defile graves of the pure saints of Norrath. Con and talk to the **Blasphemous Box** beside her before leaving.

Graves are located in **Collingridge Cemetery (N)** beside the river, east of the Elder's Tomb. Interact with grave headstones to spawn **Mourners** (attacking headstones spawns two at a time).

Loot **Crystallized Sorrow Gems** until you have a stack of 25.
- Pure crystallized sorrow = 50 faction
- Normal crystallized sorrow = 10 faction

Return to Miasma and speak with the Blasphemous Box to turn them in. Repeat until reaching **2000 faction with The Profane of Bertoxxulous**.

Speak with Miasma, then return to the Priest for your reward.

### Reward — Soultap
A 1cm ability opens under **Class**:

**Soultap** — "This dark power permits the Shadowknight to drink power from the soul of their enemy."  
Cast on a mob, restores about **8k mana**, recast **15 minutes**.

You may redo steps 1–7 later to choose AoE Strike instead.

---

## 🔥 AoE STRIKE PATH
You receive **10.5 million XP** and are sent to **Urglauh the Foul** in Trail's End (N).

He sends you back to **Sunnyvale (Jared's Blight (N))** to slay Healers and Paladins of Rodcet Nife at a campfire north of Sunnyvale (bottom of the mountain).

Loot **Screaming Souls (skulls)** until you have a stack of 25.

Return to Urglauh and feed them to the zombie for **10 faction** with the Corrupted of Bertoxxulous. Repeat until reaching **2000 faction with The Corrupted of Bertoxxulous**.

After max faction, return to the Priest of Bertoxxulous and demand your reward.

### Reward — Soul Cleave
A 1cm ability opens under **General**:

**Soul Cleave** — "This spell alters your strike abilities to defile the souls of all enemies around the Shadowknight."  
AoE strike, **45 sec recast**. Life tap applies only to the primary target; AoE portion deals damage only.

You may redo steps 1–7 later to choose Soultap instead.

---
